mapper.sql: id, config_code, config_name, category, sub_category, template_type, document_type, department_id, owner_role, default_priority, status, version, config_payload, created_by, published_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from extract_config where config_code = #{configCode} and status != 'DELETED' order by version desc
select from extract_config where config_name = #{configName} and status != 'DELETED' order by version desc
select from extract_config where config_name = #{configName} and status = 'PUBLISHED' order by published_at desc, version desc
select from extract_config where config_code = #{configCode} and status in ('DRAFT', 'TESTING') order by version desc
select count(1) from extract_config where status != 'DELETED' and config_payload like #{keywordLike}
mapper.update: update extract_config set config_name = #{configName}, category = #{category}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, template_type = #{templateType}, document_type = #{documentType}, department_id = #{departmentId}, owner_role = #{ownerRole}, default_priority = #{defaultPriority}, config_payload = #{configPayload}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and status in ('DRAFT', 'TESTING')
update extract_config set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update extract_config set status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and status in ('DRAFT', 'TESTING')
